'''Mazumoda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Worrite]] who served as a freelance thug-for-hire in the underworld of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He was known as "The Big Bug" due to his frightening appearance that served as an asset in his line of work.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />

{{Char-stub}}
